name: Baked Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 cups of water to a temperature between 110°F and 115°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the eggs, instant dry milk, vanilla extract, salt, and dry sugar substitute. Mix well.
3. Stir in hot water until the egg mixture is thoroughly blended.
4. Pour about one-fourth of the mixture into each of 4 custard cups. Optionally sprinkle the custards lightly with nutmeg.
5. Place the cups in an 8-inch or 9-inch cake pan and pour boiling water around the cups to a depth of 1 1/2 inches.
6. Bake at 325°F for about 1 hour, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool at room temperature before serving warm or chilled.
Food Exchange per Serving: 2/3 MILK EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 8g; PRO: 9g; FAT: 5g; CAL: 101
